arts.ttl: 22-year-old sets goal of winning “more trophies” at Man United and heaps praise on Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: This season looks like it could be the making of Amad Diallo at Man United and the winger has set the goal of winning “more trophies” with the Manchester club as he looks to remain at Old Trafford. Diallo’s career at the Premier League giants has taken some time to get going having moved to […] The post 22-year-old sets goal of winning “more trophies” at Man United and heaps praise on Erik ten Hag appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Manchester United handed Leny Yoro injury recovery boost as Erik ten Hag drops hint
arts.sum: Leny Yoro suffered a foot injury during pre-season with Man Utd but the teenager is progressing well and could return to training soon.

arts.ttl: Amad makes surprising Rasmus Hojlund comment and sums up Alejandro Garnacho relationship
arts.sum: Amad has opened up about life off the pitch at Manchester United, including who is the fastest player at the club and which teammates he is closest to

arts.ttl: Manchester United undroppable can benefit from bold Erik ten Hag call amid £91.5million transfer solution
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has rotated his side this season but Bruno Fernandes always plays. That should change for Man Utd now they a deeper squad.

arts.ttl: Tahith Chong update after ex-Man Utd star collapsed on pitch during Luton game
arts.sum: Luton star Tahith Chong suffered a head injury late in the first half of defeat away to Plymouth Argyle but manager Rob Edwards has provided a positive update on his condition

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd join Williams race; Liverpool eye Pulisic as Salah replacement
arts.sum: Chelsea are prepared to pay over €120m (£100.3m) to sign Real Madrid midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni, who is also of interest to Manchester City following Rodri's injury. RB Leipzig centre-back Castello Lukeba is attracting significant interest from across Europe, with Aston Villa and Newcastle United joining a list of suitors that already includes Chelsea and Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Strangest Premier League goal ever? Nani's 2010 strike in Man Utd v Spurs is still so bizarre
arts.sum: Nani scored one of the Premier League's strangest goals against Spurs in 2010 and it shouldn't have stood...

arts.ttl: Man Utd stars 'felt less important' after Ronaldo return
arts.sum: Ronaldo’s first season proved fruitful in terms of goals but things turned tense upon the arrival of Erik ten Hag in 2022 and Solskjaer, who was in charge when the Portuguese star made his return, revealed that the dressing room dynamic could have been affected by the move. Ole Gunnar Solskjaer has opened up on Cristiano Ronaldo’s time at Manchester United, admitting that some players may have felt ‘less important’ after his return in 2021.

arts.ttl: Manchester United loanee given positive injury update after fears allayed
arts.sum: Goalkeeper Radek Vitek is spending the season on loan in Austria but the Man Utd loanee suffered what could have been a serious injury recently.

arts.ttl: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer admits Man Utd made mistake with Cristiano Ronaldo return
arts.sum: Former Manchester United manager Ole Gunnar Solskjaer has confessed the club made a mistake by re-signing Cristiano Ronaldo in 2021. United jumped at the chance to reunite with the multi-time Ballon d'Or winner when it appeared as though he would be leaving Juventus for Manchester City, and Ronaldo enjoyed plenty of early success under Solskjaer and interim boss Ralf Rangnick.
